allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; abi=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['abi']; [print\(json.dumps\(f,indent=2\)\) for f in abi if f.get\('type'\)=='function']")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; abi=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['abi']; [print\(json.dumps\(f,indent=2\)\) for f in abi if f.get\('type'\)=='event']")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d.get\(k\) for k in ['main','module','exports','types','typings']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('exports:', list\(p.get\('exports', {}\).keys\(\)\)[:20]\); print\('main:', p.get\('main'\)\); print\('types:', p.get\('types'\)\)")
